description:
You are a sales representative at a wholesale distribution company. You attended the NAWGA 2024 trade show and collected business cards from 12 potential clients. Import the 12 contacts from the CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/tradeshow_leads.csv into SuiteCRM. Map the CSV columns to the following SuiteCRM contact fields:
- "First Name" to First Name
- "Last Name" to Last Name
- "Job Title" to Title
- "Company" to Account Name
- "Email" to Email Address
- "Office Phone" to Office Phone
- "Mobile Phone" to Mobile Phone
- "Street Address" to Primary Address Street
- "City" to Primary Address City
- "State" to Primary Address State
- "Zip Code" to Primary Address Postalcode
- "Country" to Primary Address Country
- "Notes" to Description
